directives.title: Session Handoff Required
directives.rule: Every work session ends with /handoff. No exceptions. State files must be updated before closing.

directives.title: Commit Before Context Switch
directives.rule: Commit current work before switching to a different project or task. Uncommitted work is invisible work.

directives.title: Read Before Writing
directives.rule: Always read existing code and context before making changes. Understand what exists before modifying it.
